data.title: Register design.figma_pat config key in validate-config.sh and docs
data.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN

## What
Register the design.figma_pat config key in the allowlist used by validate-config.sh and add its documentation entry to CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md.

## Files to Modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh: add design.figma_pat to the list of accepted design.* keys
- plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md: add documentation section for design.figma_pat after design.manifest_patterns

## Config Key Specification
- Key name: design.figma_pat
- Description: Personal Access Token for Figma REST API. Used by figma-auth.sh to authenticate pull-back requests. Read from config file; FIGMA_PAT env var takes precedence if set.
- Accepted values: Figma PAT string (typically prefixed figd_); optional in config (use FIGMA_PAT env var as alternative)
- Default: absent (env var FIGMA_PAT is the fallback)
- Used by: plugins/dso/scripts/figma-auth.sh
- Security note: Do not commit actual PAT value; use env var or .gitignore-d local override

## CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md entry format
Follow the same table format as other design.* entries (see design.manifest_patterns section at line ~399).

## Unit test exemption justification
This task modifies two artifacts:
1. validate-config.sh allowlist addition: config-key registration only, no conditional logic to test beyond the allowlist check
2. CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md: doc-only change; testing the content would be a change-detector test

No unit tests needed per behavioral testing standard Rule 2 (doc-only and pure-config-registration changes).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] validate-config.sh accepts design.figma_pat without warning
  Verify: bash -c 'echo design.figma_pat=test | grep -qF design.figma_pat plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh'
- [ ] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md has design.figma_pat section
  Verify: grep -q 'design.figma_pat' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
- [ ] Documentation entry includes description, accepted values, default, used-by fields
  Verify: grep -A 10 'design.figma_pat' plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md | grep -q 'figma-auth.sh'
- [ ] validate-config.sh runs without error with a test config containing design.figma_pat
  Verify: echo 'design.figma_pat=figd_testtoken' > /tmp/test-figma-config.conf && bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate-config.sh /tmp/test-figma-config.conf 2>&1 | grep -v 'design.figma_pat.*unknown' | true

## Escalation Policy
Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference.
